title: Wohnen - Home and Living
grammar_topic: Prepositions of place: in, an, auf, neben, vor, hinter, zwischen

vocabulary.translation: shared apartment - very common for Azubis

grammar.topic: Two-way prepositions: dative for location, accusative for movement

forms.Wo ist das Bett?: Where is the bed? -> dative: Das Bett ist im Zimmer
forms.Wohin gehst du?: Where are you going? -> accusative: Ich gehe ins Zimmer

objectives: Understand the location vs movement rule
Know WG vocabulary for your Ausbildung accommodation
nursing_note: Most Azubis live in a WG. Das Patientenzimmer (patient room), das Schwesternzimmer (nurses station) use the same room vocabulary.
